item.title: The revolution will be between selfish ignorant racists and people who want everyone to enjoy life while the billionaires hide in their bunkers
item.description: They will exploit everyone under their control and treat them like garbage as long as they can get away with it and they are getting more control over your lives every day
item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: Get the flock out of here
item.dc:creator: thebigbaka

item.title: Texas used 83,000 cameras to track a woman who had an abortion. Nobody can find a case of even 100 cameras used to find a rapist. Thousands of rape kits sit untested. The priorities are clarifying.
item.description: Texas police deployed 83,000 surveillance cameras to track down a woman who had an abortion. EIGHTY THREE THOUSAND. That is not a typo. That is not a rounding error. That is the full mobilization of a state surveillance apparatus — the kind of infrastructure that would make an authoritarian regime blush — deployed against a woman for a medical procedure. Nobody — and I mean NOBODY — can find a documented case of police deploying even 100 cameras to track down a rapist. Not 83,000. Not 1,000. Not 100. The surveillance state that cannot locate sexual predators somehow found every camera in Texas the moment a uterus made a decision it disagreed with. The priorities are clarifying. 83,000 cameras. For a woman. Who had a legal medical procedure in another state. Meanwhile rape kits sit untested in evidence lockers across Texas in their THOUSANDS. The technology exists. The infrastructure exists. The will exists — it just requires a target the state has decided deserves it. This is not about babies. It never was. ⛓️ 83,000 cameras to find a woman who had an abortion. Fewer than 100 to find rapists. The math is not complicated. The message is not subtle. Texas has built a surveillance state and pointed it exclusively at women's bodies. Un fucking real indeed. ⚖️ #83000Cameras #TexasAbortionBan #ReproductiveRights #SurveillanceState #RapeKitBacklog #TexasCops #BodyAutonomy #UnfuckingReal
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Bless Her Heart
item.description: Well, bless her heart! Miss Lindsey must have had a right powerful case of the vapors and pitched a conniption fit and a hissy fit at the same dang time. Ah do declare she’s really stepped in the stinky poo this time. Was she tryin’ to distract us from those naughty files by mentioning them? Miss Lindsey has sorely miscalculated and needs to fix this expeditiously, if not sooner.

23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alain Delon
"A lot of people mistake a short memory for a clear conscience." - Doug Larson So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: The last 80s New Wave Synthpop band
item.description: Brighter Than a Thousand Suns is a recent band that got tired of all the Retrowave, Vaporwave, etc bands that merely imitate the 80s without actually hitting the mark. They go through great pains to make sure they do things the old way so that they'd easily slot into an 80s radio station and people would just think they're hearing an obscure band actually from the 80s. Here's the official music video for the song in this post: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3_HxLbr2y8s
item.dc:creator: TheMoonBnuuy

item.title: Religious Fanatic Lunatics
item.description: They call themselves Christian nationalists. The second word is key. They have reduced “Christian” from a standalone noun to an adjective. Their preachers are frauds who use their followers to fund a lavish lifestyle by telling them that they can have it, too – if they do what they’re told to do, think what they’re told to think, and believe what they’re told to believe. “Christian” nationalism is a cult well on the way to becoming a terrorist organization. That’s not an extreme thing to say. Look at how many of them advocate violence “in the name of god”. Then look at how many have actually committed violence already.
item.dc:creator: Resistance1000

item.title: Spikey Ouroboros
item.description: Armadillo Girdled Lizard (Ouroborus cataphractus) from South Africa. Instead of running, it grabs its own tail and curls into a perfect ring, exposing only its heavily armored scales while hiding its soft belly. The pose looks like the ancient symbol of the Ouroboros, but it's a real survival strategy. Even more surprising, these lizards are unusually social for reptiles and often live together in colonies of 30–60 individuals. Nature really built a tiny dragon with medieval armor.
item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: A friend in need is a friend indeed
item.dc:creator: IliveIdyeIliveagain

item.title: Ex-Bell call centre agent broke their NDA: agents had 9 min per call, 90 sec hold time, trained to hang up on you, earned $400/month, sanctioned for peeing. Bell posted record fucking profits. Then did Bell Let's Talk day.
item.description: A former Bell overseas call centre agent just broke their NDA to explain why you waited 45 minutes and got hung up on. Ready? Agents had 9 MINUTES per call. Go one second over: written up. 90 seconds of hold time TOTAL. Problem unsolvable in 6 minutes? They were silently trained to hang up. Bell called this "customer service." The agents doing this earned $400-600 CAD A MONTH. Rode packed buses for hours to get there. Worked 10-hour shifts with 15-minute breaks. Got sanctioned for being 60 seconds late to PEE. And while YOU screamed at them, a supervisor whispered in their earpiece: "Get them off the phone." Crying in the bathroom between calls was NORMAL. Bell knows about every hangup, every fake ticket, every broken human. Their quality team MONITORS IT. They count on burnout keeping wages low and preventing unionisation. Meanwhile Bell executives post RECORD PROFITS and point to "network investments." The customer experience is not a bug. It is a FEATURE. And then — AND THEN — they do "Bell Let's Talk" day. About MENTAL HEALTH. $400/month. Sanctioned for peeing. Trained to hang up. Record profits. "Bell Let's Talk." An ex-agent broke their NDA because the machine has to stop. Bell Canada has built a monument to corporate cruelty and painted a ribbon on it. Let's make this too loud to ignore. #BellLetsTalk #BellCanada #CallCentreAbuse #BreakingNDA #CorporateGreed #BellCustomerService #LetsMakeThisLoud #EatTheRich https://www.reddit.com/r/bell/s/dTL7n2fgFo
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: I really can not grasp that she is so racistly angry that she can just "absentmindedly" swing her dog around like that.
item.description: when my dog is with me in public, my concern is 100% about maintaining his safety & wellbeing. If I got jumped, I'd be trying to protect him first. If I saw a car barreling towards me, I'd throw my dog out of the way before myself. If I was hungry, he'd get snackos first... Then there's this broad just tossing her accessory around cause she needed to get a few hits in. SMH ⁷
item.dc:creator: Jamesstin

item.title: I too had a 20 minute conversation with Mitch McConnell
item.description: That's right. I too can reveal that I had a 20 minute conversation with Mitch McConnell in which he revealed to me his deep support for trans rights, his favorite GI Joe character (Deep Six), and the location of the Treasure of the Sierra Madre. /s

item.title: GovBrief Today #523
item.description: ICE forced detained Iranians to sit down with officials of the government they fled, and those officials had already read their asylum files. A federal lawsuit filed today says the Trump administration cut a deal with Tehran in March 2025 and handed over the immigration files of hundreds of Iranian detainees at monthly meetings for more than a year. After American bombs began falling on Iran in February, the meetings stopped, but the file deliveries continued. These are pro-democracy protesters and Christian converts who told our government exactly why going home means death. Federal law forbids revealing that a person even applied for asylum, because the revelation is itself the danger. America started this war. We struck Iran in 2025, stopped, and struck again with Israel in February. Today Trump stood at NATO and declared the ceasefire over. Through all of it, his deportation machine kept treating Tehran as a partner, and the lawsuit says the two governments plan to put more of these people on a plane to Iran within weeks. I've emailed 8,133 stories over 523 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260707-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/greenland-nato [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july7 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/cyclopsoriasis [4] https://go.govbrief.today/election-fema [5] https://go.govbrief.today/fla-voting-guide [6] https://go.govbrief.today/wsic-voters [7] https://go.govbrief.today/beef-price-pressure [8] https://go.govbrief.today/splc-plea [9] https://go.govbrief.today/stopwoke-defeat [10] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-houston [11] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-asylum [12] https://go.govbrief.today/tubman-bill [13] https://go.govbrief.today/usda-rif [14] https://go.govbrief.today/trumpvpost [15] https://go.govbrief.today/nyc-pets [16] https://go.govbrief.today/fulton-worker-data Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: He got me thru surgery recovery… so I cannot give up. (TW: mental health, pet loss)
item.description:
Hey y’all... I’m Emily, and I have EGPA (a rare type of vasculitis). I love rats (I recently lost a heart rat ? more about him later in the post), I love drawing, I unfortunately have nerve damage that affects my ability to draw, I have c-PTSD, OCD, treatment-resistant MMD, and lastly- I’ve posted about these struggles many times. Either to scream into the void, or to genuinely seek connection and help. ~~~~ There is a picture in this post that shows a snippet of a letter that I got last month which is sort of ruining my life. From my knowledge- this is happening a lot, at least in my state. It was time for my redetermination- so I submitted all my stuff, lo and behold. My benefits have stopped. I had to appeal in writing. They want less people on medicaid and I’m like,,,, GEEEEEZZZZZ I WONDER WHY THAT IS AND WHAT PPL ARE RESPONSIBLE ?? !! ?? ~~~~ So to be very blunt and forward, I need some help to bridge this gap. I am humbly coming to the internet- as I do when nothing else has worked and I have no more options. So I’m just like, fck it. I’m gonna share my ko fi link…. It has my art, if anyone wants to check it out and has anything to spare. Here it is: https://ko-fi.com/darkratlord/goal?g=9 Or my direct PyaPal: @sillygooseinc ~~~~ MORE LORE(?) In the first pic- that is my pet rat, Muad’Dib (also known affectionately as ‘Deeble’) who sadly passed away a couple months ago. I’ve had to have two surgeries because of my illness. My last surgery was in November of 2025, and I couldn’t have gotten through it without my boy. Losing him and missing him is the hefty cost of loving him. What an honor it was. ~~~~(TW: mental health, self harm, self deleting) As hard as things are right now- I think of Deeble to keep myself going. I have attempted 3 times, been hospitalized, the whole nine. My last attempt was 6 years ago and I promised overtime, myself, everything, the UNIVERSE- that I would never do it again. I promised that would love and find beauty in not only the good moments, but the difficult moments as well. I’m in a dark place- but I still have my sweet ratty boys, who truly love me all the time@no matter what. Also- I’ve included some makeup and glam pics, as that helps me feel alive and less like a corpse- it also lets my creativity out. Rats and pretty skies included. Thank you to any angels who read this whole thing... It means so much. More than you know. I always feel less alone when I post here. ♥️?
He loved to perch on my head!
Fav selfie buddy ?
Pain, agony, dread, despair
My king
He was only a LIIIIITTLE mischievous ok
Reality
:)
Dead inside
Here’s a rainbow bridge poem, in case anyone feels like sobbing today!!! ??
One of my favbvvv Deeble pics!
My art
My boy Choso :-) he’s a selfie buddy in training- and I may be biased- but I think he’s doing a pretty damn good job.
lol
Anotha one
Sleepy Mika!
This is Mika (the angel- one of my cuddliest rats I’ve ever had in my 10 yrs of eat ownership!) again ♥️
Choso is a tide pod ✨✨
Some glam incoming ok
Choso and Mika!
My rotund son.
Skyyyy how I love u soooo
Literal goals.
item.dc:creator: DarkRatLord3000
